creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Conrad Meyer from comment #1)

LLVM's schedule is:

2018-08-01 branch & RC1
2018-08-22 RC2
2018-09-05 final

There is a discussion ongoing with re@ and toolchain people (dim@ et al) about Clang 7.  dim is working on a clang700-import branch already.

This PR as a blocker of 228911 does not mean it will necessarily make it into 12.0 or that 12.0 will be held up for it, only that re@ and toolchain folks will track it.
